parameters.query: SELECT cp.id, cp.opportunity, cp.agency, cp.plan_data->>'solicitation_number' as sol_num, cp.plan_data->>'stage' as stage, cp.plan_data->>'source_url' as source_url, cp.plan_data->>'compliance_last_checked' as last_checked FROM gda_capture_plans cp WHERE cp.plan_data->>'stage' IN ('Interest','Qualify','Pursue','Solicitation','Proposal','Go/No-Go') AND cp.plan_data->>'solicitation_number' IS NOT NULL AND cp.plan_data->>'solicitation_number' != '' ORDER BY cp.contract_value DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 15

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ auth_key: $env.GDA_API_KEY_2026, action: 'generate', plan_id: $json.plan_id, opportunity: $json.opportunity, agency: $json.agency, solicitation_number: $json.sol_num, refresh_reason: 'amendment_monitor' }) }}

parameters.query: ={{ "UPDATE gda_capture_plans SET plan_data = jsonb_set(plan_data, '{compliance_last_checked}', '\"" + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] + "\"') WHERE id = " + $json.plan_id + "; INSERT INTO gda_stage_audit_log (entity_type, entity_id, action, new_value, source, created_at) VALUES ('compliance_check', '" + $json.plan_id + "', 'amendment_scan', '" + ($json.sol_num || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', 'amendment-monitor', NOW())" }}
